text:
Once upon an ordinary day.

There lived an owl.

She loved berries.

So she flew everywhere berry red.

One day, she spotted a patch.

It smelled divine.


Maybe it wasn't just berries.



After all, she was quite wild.

Just maybe.



With her sharp eyes.




She took some.

It felt kind.

Then home she flew.

Never again that berry odd.  


























That’s all.




No. Just that.
